underlying_goal: Continue developing the competition management system by fixing connectivity issues, completing remaining features (project module, user system, paper module), and organizing project documentation
friction_detail: Frontend connectivity required multiple rounds to fix: Vite bound to IPv6 only, then browser couldn't reach port 8080 directly requiring proxy configuration, then 403 errors needed CORS adjustments; database had stale column f_user_id and mismatched filter values (A vs A类, National vs 国家级)
brief_summary: User continued from Phase 5 audit completion, debugged frontend connectivity and filter data issues, then implemented three new modules (innovation projects, user system with college selection and operation logs, and paper results) across ~40+ new/changed files.
